violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Boxes of food stored on floor in walk-in freezer. Need to be a minimum of 6 inches above floor.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Multiple food items in walk-in cooler were not labeled or dated to identify contents.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors, walls, and ceiling in the walk-in cooler & freezer requires a more frequent and more thorough cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Parts of the floor in walk-in cooler is in need of repair.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
